title: Fancy Chest
body:
# FancyChest 幻想箱
说是幻想箱，其实就是我(tianxunup)闲的没事的奇思妙想罢了，也是我学习mod制作的成果。

里面的东西完全是为了好玩和效果（或玩梗），并不适于正常生存，请勿以正常生存的眼光看待此mod！

## 模组内容
### 幻想矿、幻想块、幻想锭
这是出现在“Fancy Chest物品”创造模式物品分类中的物品，是我为了学习物品、方块和战利品列表创建的，不会自然生成。

幻想矿、幻想块需要铁镐及以上的工具挖掘。

以后会考虑开发有关其他功能，但不是现在。

### 附魔：理赔
bilibili视频介绍：https://www.bilibili.com/video/BV1cuiTeqEwA

最高等级为3，效果是玩家死亡后返还给玩家物品并恢复耐久。2级有5%的概率会对工具、装备升级（即铁质升级为钻石质），3级则有15%的概率。当附魔在方块、物品上时，不会导致升级。

当游戏规则“保留物品栏”开启时，该附魔不会有任何效果。

目前因为技术原因未添加到“Fancy Chest物品”创造模式物品分类，但你仍然能在“原材料”分类中找到它。

---English version:

# Fancy Chest
Althrough its name is "FancyChest", actually it's some ideas of me(tianxunup), it's also the result of my learning about mod.

The mod is just for recreation, not for normal survival. DON'T assess this mod in normal survival.

## Mod Elements
### Fancy ore, fancy block and fancy ingot
These items are from the item group "Fancy Chest Items". I learned mod making by making them. They won't generate in your world.

Fancy ore and fancy block need iron pickaxe to mine.

I'm thinking about to develop some other elements about them,but not now.

### Enchantment: Reimbursement
Bilibili Video：https://www.bilibili.com/video/BV1cuiTeqEwA

The max level of it is 3. It returns item to player and resets the damage when player respawned. There is a 5% chance that tools and equipment will be upgraded if the level is 2(For example, an iron pickaxe will be upgraded to a diamond pickaxe), and there is a 15% one if the level is 3. If it's enchanted on an item, it won't make it upgraded.

As the game rule "Keep Inventory" is on, It won't have any effect.

Now it's not added to the item group "Fancy Chest Items", but you can still find it in the item group "Ingredients".
